role.description: What this file does in the context of the gap

current_behavior.description: What it currently does that's relevant to the gap

constraints.description: Technical constraints, invariants, or requirements that the solution must respect

risks.description: What could go wrong, edge cases, regression risks

needs_research.description: Whether the gap requires external knowledge beyond what codebase analysis and LLM training data provide

research_questions.description: Specific questions for the research step to answer. Only meaningful if needs_research is true.

summary.description: Concise summary of the investigation — what's the problem, what's involved, what's the path forward
